summary: Custom op names that become too long after verify appends a random suffix can fail runtime regInfo lookup. Shorten the internal AscendC op/function names and keep the user-facing file/operator name separate from the deployed op identifier.

summary: If verify reports a generic CppExtension wheel-build failure, isolate the generated op.cpp build before rewriting the kernel. In this case the binding code was valid; the effective code-side repair was to keep the shorter internal op name and continue debugging the kernel/tiling path.

summary: Do not derive tileLength directly from totalLength for large tensors. Oversized UB tiles cause MTE write-address out-of-range faults. Use a fixed small tile (for example 1024 int16 elements), iterate over the full tensor, and handle the tail length explicitly in CopyIn, Compute, and CopyOut.
